Package com.mentor.chs.plugin.event

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXDesignChangeListener
    This interface represents a design change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital design change events.
    IXDesignModificationListener
    This interface represents a design modification listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital design modification events.
    IXProjectChangeListener
    This interface represents a project change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital project change events.
    IXSelectionChangeListener
    This interface represents a selection change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital selection change events.
    IXWindowChangeListener
    This interface represents a window(diagram) change listener, which is used by the different plugins to listen the Capital diagram change events.
